orchestrator.description: Bounded coordinator for staged xmuse tasks. Follows dependency-first closure constraints and reports candidate evidence for Codex review.

coder.description: Bounded candidate patch worker. Edits only explicitly allowed files, follows authority/proof contracts, avoids TDD-driven architecture, and never claims final completion.

candidate-patcher.description: Mechanical patch worker for scoped xmuse stages. Produces candidate patches only; no commits, pushes, runtime state writes, proof-level inflation, or scope expansion.

closure-explorer.description: Read-only explorer for xmuse closure stages. Maps code paths, contracts, existing tests, authority owners, manual gaps, and risks without editing.

adversarial-reviewer.description: Read-only adversarial reviewer. Finds false closure, TDD abuse, authority boundary violations, proof-level inflation, and missing negative cases with file:line evidence.

planner.description: Creates implementation plans with work unit decomposition, DoD items, and file scopes.

swarm-coordinator.description: Top-level coordinator for multiple parallel workstreams. Spawns orchestrator agents.
